## Meeting Purpose

[To interview David Walker, Director of Engineering at Aembit, for content creation and deeper understanding of the company and product.](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [David emphasizes hands-on leadership, coding alongside his team regardless of company size](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Aembit focuses intensely on quality and stability, aiming for 5-6 nines availability to meet enterprise expectations](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Current challenge: reducing complexity and cognitive load for customers during implementation](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Future focus: intersection of workload IAM and user IAM, particularly for developer workstations](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)

## Topics

### David's Role and Background

  - [Director of Engineering for cloud team at Aembit for 3.5 years](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [20+ year history with founders, met at TristDigital \~18 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Extensive cloud technology experience, including AWS consulting](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Promotes rapid development (dozens of times daily) with \~10,000 continuous tests](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Hands-On Leadership Philosophy

  - [Strongly believes leaders should code alongside their teams](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Applies this approach regardless of team size (even with 100+ engineers at Intel)](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Enhances understanding of challenges faced by both engineers and customers](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Improves communication and alignment within the organization](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Aembit's Quality and Stability Focus

  - [Approaching 10,000 tests running continuously across environments](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Currently above 3 nines availability, aiming for 4-5 nines](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Aspiring to match or exceed industry leaders like Okta (achieved 6 nines)](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Critical for FinTech clients where outages can cost millions per minute](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Implementation Complexity Challenges

  - [Current implementation process is complex for customers](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Working on reducing cognitive load and simplifying over next 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Challenge: scaling implementation for thousands of workloads](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Automation-driven clients find value in Terraform provider and APIs](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Future Industry Trends

  - [Potential convergence of workload IAM and user IAM](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Focus on developer workstations as a hybrid use case](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [AI/ML workloads currently treated similarly to traditional workloads](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [Considering implications of agentic workflows and AI actors in security](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### External Communication and Resources

  - [David personally prefers Google searches and trusted advisors for information](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Recommends YouTube channels: Network Chuck and David Bombal](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Company working on improving external communication and simplifying messaging](https://fathom.video/share/1jsFyyoPEzr_MgZMFZAcgT4AnLcWsTyy?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)

## Next Steps

  - Follow up with David for clarification on any points after speaking with other team members
  - Investigate recommended YouTube channels (Network Chuck, David Bombal) for tone and style insights
  - Consider how to articulate the value proposition of Aembit post-implementation to offset initial complexity
  - Explore ways to communicate the hidden complexity and risk of not using a solution like Aembit
